title: SpaceX Just Caught a Falling Skyscraper With Giant Chopsticks
script: For 60 years, every rocket launched was burned up or lost forever. SpaceX just broke that rule. On October 13, 2024, the Super Heavy booster — 70 meters tall, 33 engines — launched, completed its burn, and flew back to its launch tower. Giant mechanical arms called Mechazilla caught it mid-air. No splash landing. No parachutes. Just a skyscraper snapped out of the sky. Rocket reuse just became real.
